summary: Comprehensive testing of MuscleGrid CRM enterprise features. All 6 user roles tested with authentication, dashboards, and key workflows. Fixed 4 critical bugs: dispatcher queue 500 error, support/accountant/dispatcher stats endpoint calls. 28/28 backend tests pass, all UI dashboards functional.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: 500 error due to null address field in DispatchResponse model
fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Made address field Optional in server.py line 284

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Support/Accountant/Dispatcher dashboards called /api/stats which is customer-only
fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Refactored dashboards to compute stats locally from tickets/dispatches

critical_code_review_comments: Email notifications via Resend are MOCKED - logs to console when RESEND_API_KEY not configured
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created, used existing migration data (40 customers, 14+ tickets)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 user roles fully tested. Admin dashboard shows 6 stats cards, technician has 72-hour SLA tracking, gate has scan functionality, SLA breached tickets highlighted in red. Email notifications are MOCKED.

features_verified.admin_dashboard: PASS - 6 stat cards (Total, Open, Today, Hardware, Phone, SLA breaches)
features_verified.admin_all_tickets: PASS - Tickets with proper format MG-R-YYYYMMDD-XXXXX, all columns visible
features_verified.admin_gate_logs: PASS - Shows scheduled incoming/outgoing and recent scans
features_verified.admin_analytics: PASS - Shows agent performance table with SLA compliance
features_verified.technician_dashboard: PASS - Repair queue with 72-hour SLA tracking, Start/Complete buttons
features_verified.gate_dashboard: PASS - Inward/Outward scan capability, expected incoming, ready to ship
features_verified.customer_dashboard: PASS - View tickets/warranties, create new support ticket
features_verified.sla_breached_highlighting: PASS - Red 'SLA Breached' labels on tickets
features_verified.role_based_navigation: PASS - All navigation links work correctly
